texts: Morning sunlight entered the quiet library while students prepared assignments, discussed creative ideas, and drank coffee peacefully. Outside, gentle rain cooled the streets, creating a calm atmosphere throughout the city.
The harbor fog lifted slowly as fishing boats returned with their catch, gulls wheeling overhead and dockworkers calling greetings across the wooden piers.
She opened the notebook, sketched a rough diagram, erased it twice, and finally smiled when the solution arranged itself into something simple and true.
